svg.title: InfiniBand LRH (Local Route Header) field layout
svg.desc: Bit-level breakdown of the 8-byte IB LRH across two 32-bit words
svg.text: LRH — Local Route Header (8 bytes / 64 bits)
Virtual Lane (0–14 for data; 15 reserved for management)
Service Level — mapped to a VL by the SL2VL table in each switch port
Next header type: 00 = raw, 01 = IPv6, 10 = IBA local (no GRH), 11 = IBA global (GRH present)
Destination LID — unicast range 1–49151; assigned by OpenSM at fabric init
Source LID — verified by switches for ingress port checking
Packet length in 4-byte words (includes the LRH itself); used by switches for credit accounting
